ham.subject: Ticket #12345 - Build Pipeline Failure Resolved
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I wanted to let you know that the build pipeline issue referenced in Ticket #12345 has been resolved.
The root cause was a misconfiguration in the Dockerfile that caused the image build to fail due to a missing dependency.
I updated the Dockerfile to include the correct package and pushed the changes to the master branch.
The next scheduled build at 10:00 AM UTC should now succeed.

Please verify the build status in the CI dashboard and let me know if you encounter any further problems.

Thanks,
[Your Name]
DevOps Engineer

spam.subject: Urgent: IT Helpdesk Ticket #98765 – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Hello [User Name],

This is the IT Helpdesk team. We have received a ticket (ID: 98765) reporting a critical security issue.
Our system has detected that your account may have been compromised.
To protect your data, we need you to verify your identity immediately.
Please click the following link and follow the instructions:

<URL>

Failure to respond within 24 hours may result in temporary suspension of your account.

If you have any questions, reply to this email or call our support line at 1-800-IT-HELP.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
IT Support Team
